mapper.sql: id, uuid, user_id, document_type, title, description, file_url, object_path, file_size, tags, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_document WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM user_document WHERE uuid = #{uuid} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM user_document WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM user_document WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND document_type = #{documentType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
